overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic urban district. The player moves along sidewalks past residential buildings with orange balconies, crosses an open plaza, and traverses an elevated pedestrian walkway with white structural canopy, passing colorful multi-level parking structures and palm trees under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with futuristic residential buildings

events.description: player passes an NPC walking in the opposite direction on the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk between orange residential building and street, approaching distant downtown skyscrapers with digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera on sidewalk, passes by at close range

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with distinctive orange balcony accents and graffiti
tall palm tree planted in sidewalk median with concrete surround
futuristic skyscraper with large digital advertisements visible on facade
low metal fence separating sidewalk from building entrance area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a concrete sidewalk beside a residential building with orange balconies. The player walks forward past palm trees lining the path, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance. An NPC approaches from the opposite direction and passes by closely around the 6-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with pedestrian overpass ahead

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk and turns right into open paved plaza area
approaches and begins moving toward concrete staircase structure

agents.ego_description: turns right off the sidewalk into an open paved plaza, heading toward an elevated pedestrian walkway with stairs

entered.detail: multi-level parking structure with distinctive colored floors in yellow, green, purple, and brown
elevated walkway with white structural supports crossing over the plaza
wide open paved area with yellow parking lines and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the enclosed sidewalk into a wide open plaza with a colorful multi-story parking garage on the right. The camera turns right and moves across the paved area toward a pedestrian overpass with stairs, while the distant skyscrapers shift to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase leading to elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward elevated walkway
passes between two NPCs on the stairs, temporarily blocking view ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs to reach the elevated pedestrian walkway, passing other pedestrians on the stairway

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue shirt ascending stairs ahead of the player
NPC in pink shirt descending stairs toward the player

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal handrails on both sides leading upward
white painted steel beam structure forming the overhead canopy of the pedestrian bridge

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide concrete staircase toward an elevated walkway, passing under the white structural canopy. Two NPCs are encountered on the stairs - one ahead climbing up and another descending. The plaza below becomes visible in the background as the climb progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with white structural canopy overlooking city street

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered elevated pedestrian walkway
passes large tree planted in concrete planter on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pedestrian bridge with white structural beams overhead, observing the street and buildings below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the elevated walkway moving away from camera

entered.detail: mature tree growing in large rectangular concrete planter on the walkway
urban street visible below the elevated walkway with palm trees and buildings
contemporary office building with blue-tinted glass facade visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The player traverses the elevated pedestrian walkway under a white structural canopy. The colorful parking garage now appears on the left as the path curves. A large tree in a concrete planter is passed midway, and the city street is visible below through the open sides of the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase toward street level with commercial vending area

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs on far side of overpass

agents.ego_description: descending stairs on the far side of the overpass, approaching street level where red vending machines are visible

entered.detail: concrete staircase leading downward with metal handrails
bright red automated vending machines at the bottom of the stairs
large advertisement poster on wall showing 'ALL FOODS' with figure image

segments.scene_description: The player descends the stairs on the far side of the pedestrian bridge, leaving the covered walkway behind. Red vending machines and a commercial poster become visible at the bottom of the stairs as the camera approaches street level, with the colorful parking garage now on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a residential sidewalk through an open urban plaza and across an elevated pedestrian bridge. It begins by moving past a building with orange balconies and palm trees, where a passing NPC briefly crosses the path against a backdrop of distant skyscrapers. As the sidewalk opens into a wide plaza, the camera turns right toward a colorful multi-story parking garage before ascending a wide concrete staircase. The scene then shifts upward under a white structural canopy, passing other pedestrians on the stairs as the plaza below recedes into the background. Finally, the camera traverses the elevated walkway past a large planter and descends a far set of stairs, returning to street level where red vending machines and commercial posters appear beside the parking garage.
